title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
Tankers and Bulkers continue to benefit from overall firm market sentiment, supporting steady levels of secondhand activity across the board. Buyers remain engaged, with transactions materializing in both larger and mid-sized segments as confidence in earnings and asset values persists. On the dry side, Chinese interests have been particularly active in the Capesize segment.
